institution.name: Pickaway Ross Joint Vocational School District

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pickaway Ross Joint Vocational School District rose 33% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.6k → $6.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pickaway Ross Joint Vocational School District rose 33% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.6k → $6.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Pickaway Ross Joint Vocational School District fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (184 → 145).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Pickaway Ross Joint Vocational School District fell 35% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.5k → $5.5k).
